description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages lint and test, using a global COMPOSER_CACHE_DIR variable and a cache keyed "common" that stores .cache and vendor directories. In the lint stage add a grumphp job using the composer Docker image that runs composer require phpro/grumphp-shim ergebnis/composer-normalize enlightn/security-checker squizlabs/php_codesniffer --prefer-dist --ansi --no-progress --sort-packages and then vendor/bin/grumphp run -n. In the test stage define a .test_template that caches .cache and vendor, runs composer install -o --ansi --no-progress, checks PHP syntax with find src/ -name *.php -print0 | xargs -0 -n 1 -P 4 php -ln, and runs vendor/bin/phpunit --colors=always. Create four test jobs named test 8.1, test 8.2, test 8.3, test 8.4 that extend the template and use the Docker images registry.gitlab.com/behat-chrome/docker-chrome-headless:8.1, :8.2, :8.3, and :8.4 respectively. Add a test driver job that runs before_script to configure a composer repository for chrome-mink-driver and require dmore/chrome-mink-driver:dev-main, then extends the same test template using the generic registry.gitlab.com/behat-chrome/docker-chrome-headless image.
